cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this problem. So Jane booked a flight for tomorrow, which is July 29, 2002. The question is asking for the date one week ago from "today" in MM/DD/YYYY format. The options are given, so I need to figure out which one is correct. First, I need to clarify what "today" refers to here. Since Jane booked a flight for tomorrow (Jul 29, 2002), that means "today" is the day before Jul 29, 2002. So today would be July 28, 2002. Got it. So the current date is July 28, 2002. Now the question is asking for the date one week ago from today. So if today is July 28, 2002, then one week ago would be subtracting 7 days from July 28. Let me count backwards. Starting from July 28, subtracting one day would be July 27, then July 26, July 25, July 24, July 23, July 22, July 21. Wait, that's 7 days. So July 28 minus 7 days is July 21, 2002. So the date would be 07/21/2002. Looking at the options, option E is 07/21/2002. So that's probably the correct answer. Let me check again to be sure. Alternatively, maybe I can use another approach.
